Off Calendar Jul-22-2013 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions, Striking Defts Answer And Entering Default; Request For Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Mar-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Elizabeth McDonald, appearing for the moving party;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

The tentative ruling was adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.'S, Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions, Striking Defendants Answer And Entering Default; Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted because it is unopposed. Terminating sanctions are granted. Defendants' answers are stricken. A default shall be entered. Monetary sanctions of $1,060 are also awarded. Bruce Highman, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =(302/JPT)
